editions.name: The White Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull White Edition combines the exotic taste of Coconut and the fruity taste of Acai

editions.name: The Sea Blue Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Sea Blue Edition features the irresistible taste of Juneberry
editions.alt_text: Red Bull Sea Blue Edition - image

editions.name: The Red Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Red Edition offers the fresh taste of Watermelon

editions.name: The Spring Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Spring Edition features a Cherry taste with notes of almond and Cherry Blossom

editions.name: The Ice Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Ice Edition features the taste of blackberry and Vanilla with a frosted note of eucalyptus

editions.name: Energy Drink Zero
editions.flavor_description: Experience the classic taste and the wings of Red Bull without sugar

editions.name: Energy Drink
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Energy Drink is appreciated worldwide by athletes and students for long days

editions.name: The Blue Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Blue Edition is a classic drink with the fruity taste of Blueberry

editions.name: The Winter Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Winter Edition features the taste of Fuji Apple with spicy notes of Ginger

editions.name: Energy Drink Sugarfree
editions.flavor_description: Red Bull Sugarfree is the original Energy Drink, but without sugar

editions.name: The Green Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Green Edition delivers the exotic taste of Dragon Fruit

editions.name: The Peach Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Peach Edition features the taste of White Peach enhanced by citrus and floral notes

editions.name: The Apricot Edition
editions.flavor_description: The Red Bull Apricot Edition offers a perfect harmony of Apricot and Strawberry with a light hint of Peach

_translated_editions.name: The Apricot Edition
_translated_editions.description: Red Bull Apricot Edition is the perfect harmony of apricot and strawberry with a light hint of peach.
